name: Blue Corn Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the butter, eggs, and anisette. Mix well.
Slowly add the softened butter in chunks, mixing until the dough is just combined.
Add the eggs and anisette, then knead the mixture for about 4 minutes until a smooth, cohesive dough forms.
Form the dough into logs that are approximately 3 1/2 inches wide by 15 inches long by 1 inch thick. Ensure the ends are the same thickness as the middle.
Place the logs on a non-stick baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until firm.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
Slice the logs into 1/3-inch pieces.
Return the slices to the oven and bake for an additional 8 minutes, or until lightly browned. Yield: 24 biscotti.
